name: Alpha Wolf
description: Do not fear the dark, little lamb. Let me show you how to rule it.

name: Arcane Mage
description: Shut down important targets by turning them into sheep or obliterating them.

name: Arsonist
description: Set the town ablaze and watch it burn.

name: Assassin
description: Eliminate key targets whilst staying out of sight.

name: Assumer
description: Assume the role of a player.

name: Baby Dragon
description: Grow up to become a Dragon of your choice.

name: Banshee
description: A wailing spirit of despair, your screams do not kill, but shatter focus and weaken the living.

name: Bard
description: Serenade other players, enhancing their abilities.

name: Bell Ringer
description: Armed with nothing but a giant church bell and questionable hearing, ward off evil spirits.

name: Blood Fiend
description: Hunt and bleed out the Town.

name: Blood Mage
description: Drain the blood of the Town until it's dry.

name: Bodyguard
description: Protect the town from the horrors of the night.

name: Brawler
description: Strike players with a bleeding attack.

name: Cannibal
description: He used to feed the village. Now, the village feeds him.

name: Chronomancer
description: Manipulate time to protect or kill.

name: Chupacabra
description: Hunt the Werewolves to eliminate the competition, then feast on the town.

name: Clairvoyant
description: Learn information about the players targeting a player.

name: Condemned
description: Condemned for being able to conjure fire from air, you seek revenge on Town.

name: Corrupt Noble
description: Meet with the closest evil player each night.

name: Courier
description: Disrupt abilities by moving them around.

name: Cow
description: Your only ambition in life is to die.

name: Creep
description: Get to know your neighbours.. verrrry well..

name: Cthulhu
description: Control the minds of players to cause chaos.

name: Cult Leader
description: Lead a secret cult to slowly take over the Town.

name: Death
description: Harvest the souls of the living.

name: Den Mother
description: Protect your pups at all costs.

name: Dragon Knight
description: Protect those who are worthy, and burn those who aren't.

name: Druid
description: Use the powers of nature to protect the town from harm.

name: Dusk Wolf
description: Force the start of the next night by revealing your role.

name: Ember Archer
description: Unleash a volley of flaming arrows upon your enemies.

name: Faceless
description: Copy the role of another player, but share their fate.

name: Fallen Angel
description: Make the Town vulnerable to attacks.

name: Fallen Star
description: Manipulate time to protect or kill.

name: Fanatic
description: Keep the town safe as long as they don't vote to eliminate you.

name: Farmer
description: Your death will cause the town to starve.

name: Fire Dragon
description: Unleash an ancient rage in the form a fury of flames.

name: Fire Mage
description: Use fire magic to eliminate key targets.

name: Frost Drake
description: Indirectly lay waste to the town.

name: Frost Mage
description: Use frost magic to protect key targets.

name: Frost Wolf
description: The cold will be the only victor in the end.

name: Grave Digger
description: Dig up the dead to assume their role.

name: Guardian Angel
description: Vow to protect two players at all cost.

name: Harlot
description: Use lust to leave other players exposed and weak.

name: Healer
description: Heal the ailments of other players.

name: Herbalist
description: Use fire magic to eliminate key targets.

name: Horror
description: Scare important protections off of players by making them untargetable.

name: Impersonator
description: Copy the roles of other players.

name: Inquisitor
description: Obtain large amounts of information about players that is mostly accurate.

name: Jackal
description: Disrupt the town by calling the gods to protect you.

name: Janitor
description: Learn information about players whilst making them untargetable to other players.

name: Judge
description: Have the final say in all execution votes during the day.

name: Justice
description: Take justice into your own hands when the jusice system fails.

name: King
description: Prove that you are better than the Mad King.

name: Locksmith
description: Keep people safe by locking them inside of their houses.

name: Mad Bomber
description: Move a bomb between players. On death, trigger it.

name: Magistrate
description: Control the narative by influencing votes.

name: Medium
description: Be the voice of dead players.

name: Mirror Fiend
description: Reach through the mirror to steal someone's identity.

name: Nymph
description: Keep the peace so that nature can be safe.

name: Old Man
description: Role play as Dylan for a bit.

name: Pack Wolf
description: Strike at the Town with your claws.

name: Pants Wolf
description: Leave players more exposed than they were planning for.

name: Party Animal
description: Protect players by inviting them around for a party!

name: Peasant
description: Sometimes a well placed spear can change history.

name: Plague Doctor
description: Spread plague to wipe out the Town.

name: Poison Drake
description: Spread plague to wipe out the Town.

name: Priest
description: Protect the righteous and eliminate wolves with holy water.

name: Princess
description: Overturn a vote by revealing yourself.

name: Prophet
description: Use prophecies to decern information about your neighbours.

name: Psychopath
description: Take revenge on players who dare to visit your obession.

name: Queen
description: Use poison and politics to outnumber the irrelevant.

name: Ringmaster
description: Force players to roll dice for their lives.

name: Royal Guard
description: Be the first and last line of defense between the Royals and the horrors of the night.

name: Royal Knight
description: Protect the town from the horrors of the night.

name: Scryer
description: Read the negative energy of players, discerning who can kill.

name: Sectator
description: Convert Town into Werewolves if your numbers are too low.

name: Seer
description: Use your crystal ball to discern who can be trusted.

name: Serial Killer
description: Kill players if you can predict where they will be at night.

name: Shield Maiden
description: Protect large groups of players by placing yourself in front of them.

name: Shrouder
description: Enter an enraged state on death, killing someone before you perish.

name: Skeletal Wolf
description: Cause other players to crumble to dust.

name: Soothesayer
description: Cast a soothing aura to save players from death.

name: Sorceress
description: Use magic to eliminate and protect.

name: Squire
description: Assume the role of a another Townsfolk.

name: Stone Golem
description: Redirect attacks to your strong self.

name: Tormentor
description: Torment players, causing havoc in the Town.

name: Tracker
description: Do you wish to allow cookies?

name: Traveler
description: Travel to players houses learning what they are capable of.

name: Treant
description: Contain danger as an ancient protector of the forest.

name: Vigilante
description: Strike someone with an unstoppable attack by revealing yourself.

name: Warrior
description: Challenge players to duels, leaving you both bleeding.

name: Werecat
description: Flip teams if you survive an accusation.

name: Weresheep
description: Turn a player into a sheep.

name: Werewolf Herbalist
description: Use both the healing and harmful properties of the herbs around you.

name: Werewolf Scholar
description: Study players, learning what they are capable of.

name: Werewolf Shaman
description: Call upon Divine powers to protect those worthy.

name: Werewolf Tracker
description: Track important targets to find out who they target.

name: Werewolf Trickster
description: Deceive the town by faking announcements.

name: Wolf Cub
description: Sacrifice yourself to empower the other Wolves.

name: Wolf Girl
description: Blend in with the Town as you find out what people are capable of.
